title: For Another Woman
writer: Pearl Doles Bell, Frank Mitchell Dazey, Agnes Christine Johnston
actors: Kenneth Harlan, Florence Billings, Henry Sedley
plot: Stephen WInthrop, a young playboy living in New York City, inherits the estate and all the holdings of his wealthy Canadian uncle, but pays scant attention to it, preferring the "party" life in New York. He is unaware that the family
